name: MICROSCOPIC POLYANGIITIS
definition: MICROSCOPIC POLYARTERITIS = HYPERSENSITIVITY VASCULITIS = LEUKOCYTOCLASTIC pauci-immune necrotizing small-vessel angiitis without granulomatous inflammation

demographics.Path: necrotizing arteritis identical to polyarteritis nodosa but in vessels smaller than arteries
demographics.Location: skin, mucous membranes, lung, brain, heart, GI tract, kidney, muscle

distribution: skin, mucous membranes, lung, brain, heart, GI tract, kidney, muscle

CNS (involved in 37-72%): variable degrees of small-vessel disease involving white and gray matter
